claim: Mechanistic interpretability is moving from pure research to practical deployment in high-stakes industries (healthcare, finance, life sciences) for model safety and trustworthiness
actionable: Consider mechanistic interpretability techniques when deploying AI in regulated industries rather than treating it only as academic research
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science

claim: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) decompose dense model representations into interpretable primitives (concepts like coffee shops or cities) that can be manipulated directly
actionable: Use SAEs to extract interpretable features from model layers when you need to understand or steer specific model behaviors
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science

claim: Cross-layer transcoders extend SAE capability across all model layers with circuit tracing creating attribution graphs showing how outputs flow through interpretable features
actionable: Implement cross-layer transcoders when you need to trace how model outputs emerge across multiple layers through interpretable features
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science

claim: Model memorization is better understood as a spectrum from rote memorization to logical reasoning rather than binary memorized/not-memorized, with factual recall in the middle
actionable: When analyzing what models know, use a spectrum framing—distinguish between rote memorization of document sequences and flexible knowledge application
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science

claim: Goodfire uses interpretability to detect PII in model outputs via feature activation (500x cheaper than GPT-5-as-judge with higher recall) for production inference monitoring
actionable: Use feature-based detection from interpretability techniques for PII and safety monitoring rather than expensive LLM judges
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science

claim: Interpretability painting interface (paint.goodfire.ai) lets users paint directly into Stable Diffusion's concept space discovered unsupervised (animals, backgrounds, scenes)
actionable: Use unsupervised feature discovery to unlock new user interfaces and interaction modalities with models beyond standard prompting
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science

claim: Unlearning information from models is likely intractable; suppression of information is more tractable and verifiable than full removal
actionable: When designing model safety systems, focus on suppression and gating of harmful information rather than assuming complete unlearning is possible
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science

claim: Neil Nanda's pivot to pragmatic interpretability means focusing on use-case-driven research and managing by outcome rather than complete model reverse-engineering
actionable: Adopt pragmatic interpretability approaches focused on solving specific problems rather than pursuing complete model understanding as an end goal
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science

claim: Pasteur's Quadrant philosophy balances foundational research with applied outcomes, bouncing between open-ended investigation and goal-driven problem solving
actionable: Design research and product efforts to oscillate between foundational science and applied use cases rather than purely pursuing either
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science

claim: Interpretability finds novel biomarkers of disease in genomics and medical imaging by probing superhuman but opaque domain-specific models
actionable: Apply interpretability techniques to AI models trained on genomics, proteomics, or medical imaging to extract actionable scientific insights
source_title: [State of MechInterp] SAEs in Production, Circuit Tracing, AI4Science
